query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dev_panorama_status` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `confirmed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `lastMergedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `totalProducts` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Vy724JxA6DGk2d.root --database a79tkwusxJ5HWpLxCXSSXN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dev_panorama_status` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `confirmed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `lastMergedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `totalProducts` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
